# SSLProtocol.tlsProtocol1Only

**Case**

Specifies that only the TLS 1.0 protocol may be negotiated. Deprecated in iOS.

## Declaration

```swift
case tlsProtocol1Only
```
title: SSLProtocol.tlsProtocol1Only
